'''鈭歾h-b-y-r''' ('''kazhabyeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lookee|lookee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lookee|lookee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-b-y-r
|-
! Lemma
| kazhabyeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhabyeroko|thizhabyeroko]] || [[word:jizhabyeroko|jizhabyeroko]] || [[word:shizhabyeroko|shizhabyeroko]] || [[word:kizhabyeroko|kizhabyeroko]]
